package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for custom_recovery_logic_repeated_across_handlers: Repeated recover or panic-to-response logic inside handlers instead of centralized recovery middleware.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule021NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule021NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule021NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario021Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule021NegativeService, input Rule021NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
